titleZh: 国企派出董事的义务与责任
titleEn: Duties and Responsibilities of Directors Appointed by State-Owned Enterprises under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 结合实务审查国企派遣董事在新制度下的忠实职责、风险边界与信息披露义务。
abstractEn: Addresses practical risk points for SOE-nominated directors after the 2023 Company Law, including conflict management and accountability standards.
